mapper.select:
SELECT event_seq ,title ,description AS summary ,thumbnail_url ,start_at::date AS event_start_dt ,end_at::date AS event_end_dt ,COALESCE(venue_name, venue_address) AS location ,status ,CASE WHEN deleted_at IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS use_yn ,created_at::timestamp AS rgst_date_time FROM event.events
deleted_at IS NULL
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY start_at DESC, event_seq DESC

SELECT event_seq ,title ,description AS content ,description AS summary ,thumbnail_url ,start_at::date AS event_start_dt ,end_at::date AS event_end_dt ,COALESCE(venue_name, venue_address) AS location ,NULL::varchar AS registration_url ,status ,CASE WHEN deleted_at IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS use_yn ,NULL::bigint AS file_seq ,created_by AS rgst_user_seq ,created_at::timestamp AS rgst_date_time ,updated_by AS upt_user_seq ,updated_at::timestamp AS upt_date_time FROM event.events WHERE event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event.events ( slug, title, description, event_type, is_paid, start_at, end_at, venue_name, thumbnail_url, status, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( 'event-' || substr(md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text), 1, 12), #{title}, #{content}, 'main', false, #{eventStartDt}::date::timestamptz, #{eventEndDt}::date::timestamptz, #{location}, #{thumbnailUrl}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{status}, ''), 'draft'), #{rgstUserSeq}, #{uptUserSeq} )
mapper.delete: UPDATE event.events SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE event_seq = #{eventSeq}
